Character_Buster.description: Small black-and-white companion dog; short smooth coat with clear black-and-white patches; floppy ears; bright dark eyes; compact build; expressive face.
Character_Buster.visual_lock: Always a small black-and-white short-coated dog with floppy ears and bright dark eyes. No breed drift, no solid-color coat, no loss of black-and-white pattern.
wardrobe_always: snug black-and-white pajama top and bottoms after hallway dressing beat — not base portrait

Character_Momma.description: Adult woman; friendly open facial expression; soft hair; default at-home clothes (soft top or sweater, comfortable pants or similar lounge wear) in muted warm colors.
Character_Momma.voice_profile: Adult female; warm mid pitch; gentle clear pace; kind but firm energy; same calm parental voice every scene.
Character_Momma.visual_lock: Same adult mother figure throughout: friendly open facial expression, soft hair, cozy at-home wardrobe in soft warm tones.
wardrobe_always: cozy home lounge clothes in soft warm colors

Character_Daddy.description: Adult man; relaxed face; soft sleepwear or cozy home clothes.
Character_Daddy.voice_profile: Adult male; low soft presence; little or no dialogue; if any sound, quiet sleepy breath; calm still energy. Barritone
Character_Daddy.visual_lock: Same adult father figure throughout: relaxed face, soft sleepwear or cozy home clothes. No wardrobe or age drift.
wardrobe_always: soft sleepwear or cozy bed clothes — under-covers beat not base portrait

Character_Bunnies.description: Small live rabbits; soft fur in natural browns and grays with white accents; upright alert ears; compact bodies.
Character_Bunnies.voice_profile: Non-speaking animals: light thumps and rustle only if needed; quick skittish energy; consistent small-rabbit presence in dream only.
Character_Bunnies.visual_lock: Always ordinary small rabbits with soft natural fur and upright ears; no cartoon mash-up species, no costume.

Character_Narrator.description: Pure voice-over narrator; no on-screen body.
